title: elymus junceus var. desertorum
intro: Elymus junceus var. desertorum, also known as desert wildrye, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is native to North America and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of desert wildrye include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Desert wildrye can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
